subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto them that desire to drink of the wine of life and turn toward the Dawning-Place of the Cause of their Lord, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یشرب رحیق الحیوان و یتوجه الی مطلع امر ربه الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
